initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT customer.c_customer_sk, customer.c_customer_id, SUM(store_returns.sr_return_amt) AS total_return
FROM store_returns
JOIN store ON store_returns.sr_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
JOIN date_dim ON store_returns.sr_returned_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN customer ON store_returns.sr_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
WHERE store.s_state = 'GA' AND date_dim.d_year = 2000
GROUP BY customer.c_customer_sk, customer.c_customer_id
ORDER BY total_return DESC
LIMIT 100

    JOIN date_dim ON store_returns.sr_returned_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN customer ON store_returns.sr_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
WHERE

    AND date_dim.d_year = 2000
GROUP BY 
    customer.c_customer_sk,
    customer.c_customer_id
ORDER BY

LIMIT 100
